title: Membibi

{{Quote|The membibi certainly died quickly enough.|Luminara Unduli|<ref name="TAS" />}}
A '''membibi''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] four-[[Limb/Legends|legged]] [[Diet/Legends|insectivore]] native to the rocky outcroppings on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. Membibis had a low-slung snout protruding from the face with a splotchy pale [[Color/Legends|white]] body, which ended in a long whip-like tail.<ref name="TAS" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]], [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]], and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his apprentice [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], encountered membibis while on a [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|mission]] to the planet Ansion. One of the membibi, while running upwind from its den to a burrow, was attacked by a carnivorous-poisonous [[chawix]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] that was carried by the wind onto the membibi's back. The chawix used the [[Nervous system|nerve]] [[Poison/Legends|poison]] in its thorns to incapacitate and [[Death/Legends|kill]] the membibi. [[Kyakhta|One]] of the Jedi's [[Alwari]] guides wished the same fate (but expanding the number of attacking chawix to twelve, to accommodate size) for his former employer, [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="TAS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Membibi first appeared in [[Alan Dean Foster]]'s ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'', which was released on [[January 29]], [[2002]]. It was later mentioned in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
